name: implement-a-unified-social-20260409-1748
idea: Implement a unified social publishing system that preserves current immediate Twitter/X posting, adds scheduled queueing for tweets/replies/retweets, tracks success and failure, and is extensible to multiple outbound channels/platforms with per-channel routing and configuration.
